query:
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN ntnbTaxa IS NULL AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ipca_sem_ntnb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ntnbTaxa IS NOT NULL AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ipca_com_ntnb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN indexador NOT LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as di_total,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM spread_analysis;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3TCbxwuMo8bqgEH.3d9f28c4dd9f --database ibSgD3x7K24f8UHUmWHZV3 --execute 
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN ntnbTaxa IS NULL AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ipca_sem_ntnb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN ntnbTaxa IS NOT NULL AND indexador LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as ipca_com_ntnb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN indexador NOT LIKE '%IPCA%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as di_total,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM spread_analysis;
